languages.original_text: {n}The xenos's head turns slightly toward Seberian.{/n} "The little thief. Dared to steal from the Preserver of Histories, and now causing trouble again. What is this, some foolhardy rescue attempt? So, your worthless name is still recalled by one of your short-lived kind?"

languages.text: {n}Голова ксеноса чуть поворачивается в сторону Себериана.{/n} "Маленький воришка, посмевший украсть у самого Хранителя истории, и вновь ты доставляешь мне неприятности. Что это, самонадеянная спасательная операция? Твое никчемное имя еще помнит кто-то из твоих короткоживущих собратьев?"

{n}The xenos's head turns slightly toward Seberian.{/n} "The little thief. Dared to steal from the Preserver of Histories, and now causing trouble again. What is this, some foolhardy rescue attempt? So, your worthless name is still recalled by one of your short-lived kind?"

Что это, самонадеянная спасательная операция? Твое никчемное имя еще помнит кто-то из твоих короткоживущих собратьев?"

{n}The xenos's head turns slightly toward Seberian.{/n} "The little thief. Dared to steal from the Preserver of Histories, and now causing trouble again. What is this, some foolhardy rescue attempt? So, your worthless name is still recalled by one of your short-lived kind?"

languages.text: {n}ゼノの頭が少しシベリアの方へ傾いた。{/n}「小さな泥棒。歴史の守護者から盗み、また騒ぎを起こす。これは何だ、無謀な救出劇か。だから、お前のような短命な種族の一人が、お前のような価値のない名前を覚えているのか？」
languages.original_text: {n}The xenos's head turns slightly toward Seberian.{/n} "The little thief. Dared to steal from the Preserver of Histories, and now causing trouble again. What is this, some foolhardy rescue attempt? So, your worthless name is still recalled by one of your short-lived kind?"

traits.locale_text: {n}ゼノスの頭が少しシベリアの方へ傾いた。{n}「小さな泥棒。歴史の守護者から盗み、また騒ぎを起こす。これは何だ、無謀な救出劇か。だから、お前のような短命な種族の一人が、お前のような価値のない名前を覚えているのか？」

languages.text: {n}异形微微转头看向塞贝里安。{/n}“小贼。胆敢偷窃历史保存者之物，现在又来惹麻烦。这算什么，某种自杀式的营救行动？看来，你们这短命物种里，居然还有人记得你那不值一提的名号？”
languages.original_text: {n}The xenos's head turns slightly toward Seberian.{/n} "The little thief. Dared to steal from the Preserver of Histories, and now causing trouble again. What is this, some foolhardy rescue attempt? So, your worthless name is still recalled by one of your short-lived kind?"

traits.locale_text: {n}异形微微转头看向塞贝里安。{/n}“小贼。胆敢偷窃历史保存者之物，现在又来惹麻烦。这算什么，某种自杀式的营救行动？看来，你们这短命物种里，居然还有人记得你那不值一提的名号？”

languages.text: {n}La cabeza del xenos se gira ligeramente hacia Seberian.{/n} «Este ladronzuelo... Osó robar al Preservador de Historias y ahora vuelve a causar problemas. ¿Qué es esto, un absurdo intento de rescate? ¿Algún miembro de tu efímera especie aún recuerda tu nombre?».
languages.original_text: {n}The xenos's head turns slightly toward Seberian.{/n} "The little thief. Dared to steal from the Preserver of Histories, and now causing trouble again. What is this, some foolhardy rescue attempt? So, your worthless name is still recalled by one of your short-lived kind?"

traits.locale_text: {n}La cabeza del xenos se gira ligeramente hacia Seberian.{/n} «Este ladronzuelo... Osó robar al Preservador de Historias y ahora vuelve a causar problemas. ¿Qué es esto, un absurdo intento de rescate? ¿Algún miembro de tu efímera especie aún recuerda tu nombre?».

languages.text: {n}Der Xenos wendet seinen Blick Seberian zu.{/n} "Der kleine Dieb. Erst wagt er es, den Bewahrer der Geschichten zu bestehlen, und jetzt macht er wieder Ärger. Was wird das hier? Ein törichter Rettungsversuch? Also erinnert sich jemand aus deinem kurzlebigen Volk noch an deinen wertlosen Namen?"
languages.original_text: {n}The xenos's head turns slightly toward Seberian.{/n} "The little thief. Dared to steal from the Preserver of Histories, and now causing trouble again. What is this, some foolhardy rescue attempt? So, your worthless name is still recalled by one of your short-lived kind?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Xenos wendet seinen Blick Seberian zu.{/n} "Der kleine Dieb. Erst wagt er es, den Bewahrer der Geschichten zu bestehlen, und jetzt macht er wieder Ärger. Was wird das hier? Ein törichter Rettungsversuch? Also erinnert sich jemand aus deinem kurzlebigen Volk noch an deinen wertlosen Namen?"

languages.text: {n}Le xénos tourne légèrement la tête vers Seberian.{/n} « Après avoir osé dérober l'un des biens du Conservateur des histoires, le petit voleur recommence à causer des ennuis. Qu'est-ce donc, une tentative irréfléchie de sauvetage ? Votre nom insignifiant serait-il resté dans la mémoire d'un de vos semblables à la vie si courte ? »
languages.original_text: {n}The xenos's head turns slightly toward Seberian.{/n} "The little thief. Dared to steal from the Preserver of Histories, and now causing trouble again. What is this, some foolhardy rescue attempt? So, your worthless name is still recalled by one of your short-lived kind?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Le xénos tourne légèrement la tête vers Seberian.{/n} « Après avoir osé dérober l'un des biens du Conservateur des histoires, le petit voleur recommence à causer des ennuis. Qu'est-ce donc, une tentative irréfléchie de sauvetage ? Votre nom insignifiant serait-il resté dans la mémoire d'un de vos semblables à la vie si courte ? »

languages.text: {n}Zenonun kafası, hafifçe Seberian'a doğru dönüyor.{/n} "Küçük hırsız. Tarihlerin Koruyucusu'ndan çalmaya cüret ettin, yine sorun çıkarıyorsun. Ne bu, pervasız bir kurtarma girişimi mi? Demek değersiz ismin, kısa ömürlü türünün bir mensubunca hâlâ hatırlanıyormuş."
languages.original_text: {n}The xenos's head turns slightly toward Seberian.{/n} "The little thief. Dared to steal from the Preserver of Histories, and now causing trouble again. What is this, some foolhardy rescue attempt? So, your worthless name is still recalled by one of your short-lived kind?"
